findings.title: Open redirect vulnerability
findings.description: The function accepts user-controlled redirect_url parameter without validation and passes it directly to redirect(). This allows attackers to redirect users to malicious external sites.
findings.fix: Validate the redirect_url against a whitelist of allowed domains/paths, or ensure it's a relative path within your application. Example: if not redirect_url.startswith('/') or redirect_url.startswith('//'): return redirect('/default')
